title: Return Verification Signal Playbook
description: Track returned units or jobs: real failure vs no-fault-found. Cross-train support and verification. Use data for fair metrics and customer health reviews.

mindset.principle: Returns tell the truth about support and test. NDF is signal, not embarrassment.

mistakes.label: Ding support without verification loop
mistakes.cost: Techs game returns; test lane never improves

mistakes.label: Assume bench is perfect
mistakes.cost: Support stops trusting process; fights every metric

mistakes.label: Bury no-fault-found rate
mistakes.cost: Miss cross-training opportunity and customer trust story

mistakes.label: Enterprise review with slides and no return stats
mistakes.cost: Customer assumes you blow smoke on hardware or service validity

scope.focus: Support plus verification or QA on physical or redo returns
not_for: pure software SaaS with no return artifact

return_outcomes.label: Defect reproduced on verification
return_outcomes.meaning: Support diagnosis validated or caught in test

return_outcomes.label: No defect found (NDF)
return_outcomes.meaning: Return did not reproduce; training or customer education gap

return_outcomes.label: Passes verification after customer claimed fail
return_outcomes.meaning: Possible misuse, environment, or support miss

return_outcomes.label: Cannot reproduce in window
return_outcomes.meaning: Extend test protocol or escalate engineering

metrics_fairness.rule: When support or test gets dinged on return metrics, show the verification record that triggered the ding.
metrics_fairness.why: The minute people get scored, they demand proof the test scored them fairly. Publish the loop.

support_to_verification: Support rides verification bench half-day monthly
See NDF cases support thought were obvious fails
Learn test steps that prove defect
verification_to_support: Verification listens to intake calls on high-NDF SKUs
Learn what customer said vs what bench sees
cross_training_program.expected_result: Both areas improve: fewer false returns, faster real fails, lower NDF blame fights

decision_branches.situation: Returns happen but outcomes not logged
NDF rate rises on SKU or tech
Support metric hit from return data

qbr_health_check.customer_message: Hardware or service validity backed by verification data. We distinguish real failure from no-fault-found. Support is not blowing smoke.

steps.name: QBR pack
steps.goal: Health check slides from live data

agent_signal.use_when: Returned parts or jobs need verification. NDF rate matters. Support and test blame each other. Enterprise customer wants health proof.
decision_criteria: Log outcome on every return before metric ding.
QBR uses verification stats not narrative only.
agent_signal.operator_context: Returns separate real failure from no-fault-found. Data wins QBR trust.
agent_signal.not_for: Generic ops — fetch only when use_when matches; do not replace spine chain packs.
trigger_phrases: Returned parts or jobs need verification. NDF rate matters. Support and test blame each other. Enterprise customer wants health proof.
Need playbook: Return Verification Signal Playbook
